title: Peaceful Nature
description: A small resource pack that gives some blocks a more cartoon look whilst staying close and compatible with vanilla textures
body:
This resource pack aims to fit with vanilla textures, but give some of the blocks a smoothern more cartoon look to make the game look less "straight". Each new texture has a similar color palette to vanilla blocks, in order to keep the looking of a build vanilla-friendly, except for dirt that has a more natural color.

For an experience similar to the gallery with the 3D elements and new plants, [Better Nature](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-nature) was originally going to be part of the pack but was done separatly.
